languages.text: {n}Сразу и не скажешь, что Ведка больше занимается делами лагеря как интендант, а не командует разведкой в поле — столь бесшумно она движется. Вы вновь окидываете окружение взглядом, готовясь к финальному броску.{/n}

{n}Dunawski moves so silently, you would not know that she spends her days in camp dealing with quartermaster business, rather than commanding scouting parties in the field. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сразу и не скажешь, что Ведка больше занимается делами лагеря как интендант, а не командует разведкой в поле — столь бесшумно она движется. Вы вновь окидываете окружение взглядом, готовясь к финальному броску.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ダナウスキーは静かに動いている。彼女はキャンプで補給業務に携わっているのではなく、偵察隊を率いて戦場を駆け回っているのだ。再び周囲を見渡す。最後の突撃の準備だ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski moves so silently, you would not know that she spends her days in camp dealing with quartermaster business, rather than commanding scouting parties in the field. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ダナウスキーは静かに動いている。彼女はキャンプで補給業務に携わっているのではなく、偵察隊を率いて戦場を駆け回っているのだ。再び周囲を見渡す。最後の突撃の準備だ。

languages.text: {n}Dunawski o kadar sessiz hareket ediyor ki günlerini arazide keşif kollarını yönetmek yerine kampta levazım işleriyle uğraşarak geçirdiğini kimse tahmin edemez. Son taarruz için hazırlanırken etrafa bir kez daha göz atıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski moves so silently, you would not know that she spends her days in camp dealing with quartermaster business, rather than commanding scouting parties in the field. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski o kadar sessiz hareket ediyor ki günlerini arazide keşif kollarını yönetmek yerine kampta levazım işleriyle uğraşarak geçirdiğini kimse tahmin edemez. Son taarruz için hazırlanırken etrafa bir kez daha göz atıyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dunawski se mueve tan sigilosamente que nunca habrías sospechado que se dedica a la intendencia en el campamento en vez de liderar partidas de reconocimiento. Echas una última mirada en derredor y te preparas para la ofensiva final.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski moves so silently, you would not know that she spends her days in camp dealing with quartermaster business, rather than commanding scouting parties in the field. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski se mueve tan sigilosamente que nunca habrías sospechado que se dedica a la intendencia en el campamento en vez de liderar partidas de reconocimiento. Echas una última mirada en derredor y te preparas para la ofensiva final.{/n}

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡的动作悄无声息。你决然无法想象这位在战地指挥侦察队的上尉，平日里竟是在营地处理军需的事务官。你再次环顾四周，准备发起最后的突击。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski moves so silently, you would not know that she spends her days in camp dealing with quartermaster business, rather than commanding scouting parties in the field. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡的动作悄无声息。你决然无法想象这位在战地指挥侦察队的上尉，平日里竟是在营地处理军需的事务官。你再次环顾四周，准备发起最后的突击。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dunawski se déplace si discrètement qu'on pourrait croire qu'elle a passé sa vie en mission de reconnaissance sur le terrain, et non pas au camp à s'occuper de questions d'intendance. Vous observez à nouveau les environs, vous préparant mentalement à l'assaut final.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski moves so silently, you would not know that she spends her days in camp dealing with quartermaster business, rather than commanding scouting parties in the field. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski se déplace si discrètement qu'on pourrait croire qu'elle a passé sa vie en mission de reconnaissance sur le terrain, et non pas au camp à s'occuper de questions d'intendance. Vous observez à nouveau les environs, vous préparant mentalement à l'assaut final.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dunawski bewegt sich ausgesprochen leise für eine Quartiermeisterin, die den Großteil ihrer Zeit im Lager verbringt, anstatt auf dem Feld Spähtrupps zu befehligen. Du lässt erneut deinen Blick schweifen, während du dich auf eine letzte Anstrengung vorbereitest.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski moves so silently, you would not know that she spends her days in camp dealing with quartermaster business, rather than commanding scouting parties in the field. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}
